narrative:
Cincinnati 14-C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 481 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.1 percentage points.
